bio.heading: Bio
bio.text:
Spacedrifter is the band that will hit you with heavy riffs while simultaneously deliver smooth vocal harmonies, resulting in a dynamic soundscape reminiscent of the alternative rock bands of the 90’s. With an intense energy, and a raw, psychedelic feel, Spacedrifter blurs the line between the aggressive and the colorful in rock music.

The live shows take the audience on a journey between aggressive ’in your face’, hard rock, and soft, retro, psychedelic rock.
